commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a local-agent lifetime helper plus tests, wiring `src/entry.ts` and `src/index.ts` to arm an explicit `agent --local --timeout` hard timer and force process exit after successful local-agent completion.

PR surface: Source +339, Tests +308. Total +647 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: no. high-confidence live reproduction was established in this review. The PR body gives a concrete `agent --local --timeout` repro and current main lacks the proposed success-path force exit, but no current-main terminal/log proof is attached.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the remaining blockers are real-environment proof and maintainer acceptance of the forced-exit lifecycle tradeoff, not a narrow automated code repair.
